productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Silk Kota Tepchi Olive Dupatta
description: Style NoteCelebrate traditional style with this dupatta from fabindia. The stylish print and mix of colours make this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Located in the south east of Rajasthan, on the banks of river Chambal is 'Kota' a small district, which is infamous for its exclusive and incredibly delicate Kota saris. The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Product DetailsOlive green Kota Tepchi printed dupattaStitched hems with laced edgesSequins on the designMaterial and careSilk/cottonDry clean only
